questionHtml:
Element X decays through a series of alpha (α) and beta minus (β–) emissions. Which series of emissions results in an isotope of X?

A.     1α and 2β–

B.     1α and 4β–

C.     2α and 2β–

D.     2α and 3β–

meta.title: Element X decays through a series of alpha (α) and beta minus (β–) emissions. Which series of emissions results in an isotope of X? A. 1α and 2β– B. 1α and 4β– C. 2α and 2β– D. 2α
